chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1076 of 2016 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on MA No.2120/25 2.For order on office objection 3.For hg of MA No.4881/16 4.For hg of main case 04.02.2025. Mr. Hakim Ali Khan, advocate for petitioner. Syed Hussain Shah, Assistant Advocate General. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for petitioner has agreed not to press this petition and argue his matter on merits before the Court of Member (Judicial-II), Board of Revenue, Sindh, where his application for review of order dated 17.03.2014 has been transferred. Since this is an old matter, we are hopeful that the transferee Court will decide the review application not later than three months of receipt of this order. The petition is accordingly disposed of along with pending application in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
